results.name: BiPC

results.name: BiPC
results.subject: BiPC
results.question: A learner applies physiological regulation in a new problem from "Chemistry (2nd Year)". What is the best first step?

incorrect_answers: Start from Chemistry (2nd Year) application and skip checking constraints.
Use ecological balance as a shortcut and avoid interpretation.
Pick genetic inheritance by intuition and finalise without verification.

results.name: BiPC
results.subject: BiPC
results.question: Choose the most defensible correction for this claim in "Chemistry (2nd Year)": "ecological balance works without constraints."

incorrect_answers: Chemistry (2Nd Year) Application removes the need for all constraints in every case.
